% Auto-generated short paper section for run1 robustness experiments.
% Requires: \usepackage{booktabs}

\subsection{Robustness to Detection and Map Degradation}
\label{sec:run1_robustness}
We further stress-tested localisation on \texttt{run1} with two perturbation families:
\textbf{(A) detection degradation}, where we randomly dropped semantic detections
before LiDAR association (20\% and 40\%), and \textbf{(B) map degradation}, where
we removed landmarks from one contiguous map section (30\% and 50\% removal).
Table~\ref{tab:run1_robustness} reports mean $\pm$ std over three seeds
(\#11, \#22, \#33).

\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\small
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{4.5pt}
\begin{tabular}{lccccc}
\toprule
Variant & APE$_{\text{align}}$ (m) $\downarrow$ & RowCorrect $\uparrow$ & XTE (m) $\downarrow$ & Rec. frames $\downarrow$ & Rec. rate $\uparrow$ \\
\midrule
Baseline (full map) & 0.996 $\pm$ 0.028 & 0.724 $\pm$ 0.018 & 1.306 $\pm$ 0.047 & -- & -- \\
DetDrop 20\% & 1.021 $\pm$ 0.082 & 0.733 $\pm$ 0.008 & 1.306 $\pm$ 0.052 & -- & -- \\
DetDrop 40\% & 1.049 $\pm$ 0.090 & 0.735 $\pm$ 0.027 & 1.263 $\pm$ 0.049 & -- & -- \\
MapRemove 30\% & 1.045 $\pm$ 0.036 & 0.721 $\pm$ 0.011 & 1.265 $\pm$ 0.016 & 18.67 $\pm$ 6.85 & 100\% \\
MapRemove 50\% & 1.127 $\pm$ 0.129 & 0.716 $\pm$ 0.005 & 1.323 $\pm$ 0.024 & 18.67 $\pm$ 6.13 & 100\% \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\caption{Run1 robustness experiments under detection-drop and map-landmark removal perturbations.}
\label{tab:run1_robustness}
\end{table}

The detector-drop setting shows graceful degradation (APE increases by
$+2.5\%$ at 20\% drop and $+5.3\%$ at 40\% drop versus baseline) while
maintaining row correctness. Under map perturbation, the 50\% removal case is
the hardest (APE $+13.1\%$), but recovery remains consistent; for map removal,
mean recovery distance after leaving the degraded section is
$11.92 \pm 4.81$~m (30\%) and $11.79 \pm 4.46$~m (50\%).
